comment: FatBoy drawbar files are labeled an octave above their actual audio
content (Hammond convention: filename A4.mp3 contains 220 Hz audio).
Each entry's freq is the *actual audio fundamental* paired with the
filename in `name`, so the engine plays each sample at native rate=1.0
for matched pitches — preserving the recorded Leslie vibrato speed.
(Engine-side rate doubling would also double the modulation rate.)
Cost: audible range tops out at B6 instead of B7. Generated by
